Assessment CHAR 1 Contains the SNF PPS Part A Discharge Assessment (A0310H) value from the prior erroneous record to be
modified or inactivated. 0=No
1=Yes
^=Blank (Skip Pattern) effective 10/01/2023
689 N0410H_RCVD_OPIOID_DAYS_NUM N0410H_RCVD_OPIOID_DAYS_NUM N0410H Medications Received: Opioid Number Days CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days the resident received an opioid. effective 10/01/2017
discontinued 09/30/2023
690 N0450A_ANTPSYCT_MDCTNS_CNT
